title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese documents how Claude Code was used to build a product generating $481,000 annually from initial concept to full deployment in 45 days with zero coding experience. The video covers five practical steps including workflow identification, vocabulary learning, careful planning, avoiding performance pitfalls, and anticipating breaking changes.
